selection_rule.candidate_exposure: protocol-v2 threshold circuits were extracted using only the v2 synthesis split and never used the v2 gate split
selection_rule.development_domain: exact union of protocol-v2 synthesis and gate prompts
selection_rule.choice: among circuits exact against P(x) on all 512 development prompts, choose minimum edge count; break ties by lower threshold
selection_rule.fallback: if no existing threshold circuit is exact, rerun extraction on the 512-prompt development domain
selection_rule.gate_use: the new 256-prompt gate is evaluated only after selection and never changes the selected circuit or program subset

provenance.protocol_v2_result: bracket_type synthesis-selected circuit scored 247/256 on the v2 untouched gate; full model and quote circuit remained exact
provenance.protocol_v2_gate_reuse: the failed v2 gate is deliberately demoted to development data in v3 and is permanently burned as gate material
provenance.protocol_v3_gate_source: the v3 gate is the next deterministic generator stratum after all v2 synthesis and gate prompts and is disjoint from both

notes: No model predictions are used to generate, select, or filter examples.
The v3 gate split is not used to select circuits, programs, or program subsets.
Protocol-v2 artifacts remain unchanged as a failed held-out-generalization record.
